import mysql.connector
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from contextlib import contextmanager

load_dotenv()


def get_db():
    return mysql.connector.connect(
        host=os.getenv("DB_HOST"),
        user=os.getenv("DB_USER"),
        password=os.getenv("DB_PASSWORD"),
        database=os.getenv("DB_NAME"),
        charset="utf8mb4",
        autocommit=False,
    )


@contextmanager
def db_connection():
    conn = get_db()
    try:
        yield conn
        conn.commit()
    except Exception:
        conn.rollback()
        raise
    finally:
        conn.close()


def init_db():
    with db_connection() as conn:
        cursor = conn.cursor()

        # Disable FK checks so drops don't fail on constraints
        cursor.execute("SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS = 0")

        # Drop in reverse dependency order
        cursor.execute("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS order_items")
        cursor.execute("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS orders")
        cursor.execute("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS menu_items")
        cursor.execute("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users")

        cursor.execute("SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS = 1")

        # TABLE 1 — users
        cursor.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
                id         INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                name       VARCHAR(100)  NOT NULL,
                email      VARCHAR(100)  UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                password   VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,
                created_at DATETIME      DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            ) AUTO_INCREMENT = 1
              CHARACTER SET utf8mb4
              COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
        """)

        # TABLE 2 — menu items
        cursor.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS menu_items (
                id           INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                name         VARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
                category     VARCHAR(100),
                description  TEXT,
                price        DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
                emoji        VARCHAR(10),
                is_available BOOLEAN        DEFAULT TRUE
            ) AUTO_INCREMENT = 1
              CHARACTER SET utf8mb4
              COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
        """)

        # TABLE 3 — orders
        cursor.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders (
                id         INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                user_id    INT NOT NULL,
                status     ENUM('pending','confirmed','preparing','delivered','cancelled')
                               DEFAULT 'pending',
                address    TEXT,
                ordered_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
            ) AUTO_INCREMENT = 1
              CHARACTER SET utf8mb4
              COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
        """)

        # TABLE 4 — order items
        cursor.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS order_items (
                id       INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                order_id INT            NOT NULL,
                item_id  INT            NOT NULL,
                quantity INT            DEFAULT 1,
                subtotal DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id),
                FOREIGN KEY (item_id)  REFERENCES menu_items(id)
            ) AUTO_INCREMENT = 1
              CHARACTER SET utf8mb4
              COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
        """)

        cursor.close()


def seed_menu():
    with db_connection() as conn:
        cursor = conn.cursor()

        # Don't seed twice
        cursor.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_items")
        if cursor.fetchone()[0] > 0:
            cursor.close()
            return

        items = [
            ("Pizza",       "Italian",  "Crispy crust, stretchy mozzarella",     249.00, "🍕"),
            ("Burger",      "American", "Juicy beef patty with secret sauce",     179.00, "🍔"),
            ("Burrito",     "Mexican",  "Loaded wrap with rice, beans and guac",  199.00, "🌯"),
            ("Taco",        "Mexican",  "Crispy shell with grilled chicken",      149.00, "🌮"),
            ("Ice Cream",   "Dessert",  "Velvety scoops in 12 flavours",          129.00, "🍦"),
            ("Milkshake",   "Beverage", "Thick creamy shakes blended fresh",      159.00, "🥛"),
            ("Fries",       "Snack",    "Golden double fried shoestring fries",    99.00, "🍟"),
            ("Mango Juice", "Beverage", "Fresh, pulpy and thick",                 129.00, "🥭"),
            ("Donut", "Dessert", "Glazed ring fried golden, dusted with sugar", 89.00, "🍩"),
            ("Pasta", "Italian", "Al dente penne tossed in rich arrabbiata sauce", 219.00, "🍝"),
        ]

        cursor.executemany("""
            INSERT INTO menu_items (name, category, description, price, emoji)
            VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
        """, items)

        cursor.close()

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="dark-mode">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>quickbites — Order Food You Love</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      /* Light mode */
      --bg: #faf7f2;
      --surface: #fff;
      --dark: #1a1508;
      --accent: #f03e1b;
      --accent2: #f5a623;
      --muted: #9a9080;
      --border: #ede8df;
      --card-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(26,21,8,0.08);
    }

    html.dark-mode {
      --bg: #0d0c0a;
      --surface: #1a1816;
      --dark: #f0ece4;
      --accent: #f03e1b;
      --accent2: #f5a623;
      --muted: #8a8078;
      --border: #2a2620;
      --card-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--dark);
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      transition: background 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease;
    }

    /* ── NAV ── */
    nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 1.1rem 3rem;
      background: rgba(250,247,242,0.88);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      transition: background 0.3s ease;
    }

    html.dark-mode nav {
      background: rgba(13,12,10,0.88);
    }

    /* ── DARK TOGGLE ── */
    .dark-toggle {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 100px;
      width: 44px;
      height: 24px;
      position: relative;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 0.25s, border-color 0.25s;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .dark-toggle::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 3px;
      left: 3px;
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--muted);
      transition: transform 0.25s, background 0.25s;
    }

    html.dark-mode .dark-toggle::after {
      transform: translateX(20px);
      background: var(--accent2);
    }

    html.dark-mode .dark-toggle {
      background: #252219;
      border-color: #3a3628;
    }

    /* ─── DARK MODE FIXES ─── */
    html.dark-mode .add-btn {
      background: #f03e1b;
      color: #fff;
    }

    html.dark-mode .add-btn:hover {
      background: #d94300;
    }

    html.dark-mode .food-card {
      background: #1a1816;
      border-color: #3a3628;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-category {
      color: #b8a89a;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-name {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-desc {
      color: #8a8078;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-price {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-rating {
      color: #8a8078;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-time {
      color: #8a8078;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-image.pizza,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.burger,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.burrito,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.taco,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.ice-cream,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.milkshake,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.fries,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.mango-juice,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.donut,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.pasta {
      background: #252219 !important;
    }

    html.dark-mode .section-title-label {
      color: #b8a89a;
    }

    html.dark-mode .section-title {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .view-cart-link {
      color: #f03e1b;
    }

    html.dark-mode .promo {
      background: #1a1816;
      border-color: #3a3628;
    }

    html.dark-mode .promo-title {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .promo-desc {
      color: #b8a89a;
    }

    html.dark-mode .btn-promo {
      background: #f03e1b;
      color: #fff;
    }

    html.dark-mode .btn-promo:hover {
      background: #d94300;
    }

    html.dark-mode .hero-heading {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .hero-desc {
      color: #b8a89a;
    }

    .nav-logo {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.6rem;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    .logo-mark {
      width: 38px; height: 38px;
      background: var(--accent);
      border-radius: 10px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.4rem;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }

    .logo-name {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      color: var(--dark);
    }

    .nav-links {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 2rem;
    }

    .nav-links a {
      text-decoration: none;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--dark); }

    .nav-cta {
      background: var(--dark) !important;
      color: #fff !important;
      padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      font-weight: 600 !important;
      transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s !important;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--accent) !important; transform: translateY(-1px); }

    /* ── HERO ── */
    .hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 8rem 3rem 4rem;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .hero-bg-text {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -52%);
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(12rem, 22vw, 22rem);
      color: transparent;
      -webkit-text-stroke: 1.5px rgba(26,21,8,0.055);
      white-space: nowrap;
      pointer-events: none;
      user-select: none;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }

    .hero-tag {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      background: rgba(240,62,27,0.1);
      color: var(--accent);
      border: 1px solid rgba(240,62,27,0.2);
      border-radius: 100px;
      padding: 0.35rem 1rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
      width: fit-content;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s ease both;
    }

    .hero-tag .pulse {
      width: 7px; height: 7px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--accent);
      animation: pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes pulse {
      0%,100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
      50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.7); }
    }

    .hero-headline {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(4.5rem, 9vw, 9rem);
      line-height: 0.95;
      letter-spacing: 0.01em;
      margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
      position: relative;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s 0.1s ease both;
    }

    .hero-headline .red { color: var(--accent); }
    .hero-headline .stroke {
      color: transparent;
      -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--dark);
    }

    .hero-sub {
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      max-width: 40ch;
      line-height: 1.65;
      margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s 0.2s ease both;
    }

    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 1rem;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s 0.3s ease both;
    }

    .btn-primary {
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #fff;
      padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 1rem;
      transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    }
    .btn-primary:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(240,62,27,0.3);
    }

    .btn-ghost {
      color: var(--dark);
      padding: 0.9rem 1.5rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--dark); background: rgba(26,21,8,0.04); }

    .hero-stats {
      display: flex;
      gap: 2.5rem;
      margin-top: 4rem;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s 0.4s ease both;
    }

    .stat-num {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 2rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      color: var(--dark);
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .stat-label {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.07em;
      margin-top: 0.2rem;
    }

    /* Floating emoji orbs */
    .float-orb {
      position: absolute;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 2.2rem;
      animation: floatOrb 6s ease-in-out infinite;
      pointer-events: none;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12));
    }
    .float-orb:nth-child(1)  { top: 15%; right: 12%; width: 80px; height: 80px; animation-delay: 0s; }
    .float-orb:nth-child(2)  { top: 40%; right: 25%; width: 64px; height: 64px; animation-delay: 1.2s; }
    .float-orb:nth-child(3)  { top: 65%; right: 8%;  width: 72px; height: 72px; animation-delay: 2.4s; }
    .float-orb:nth-child(4)  { top: 25%; right: 40%; width: 56px; height: 56px; animation-delay: 0.8s; }

    @keyframes floatOrb {
      0%,100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); }
      33%      { transform: translateY(-14px) rotate(5deg); }
      66%      { transform: translateY(8px) rotate(-4deg); }
    }

    @keyframes fadeDown {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-16px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    /* ── TICKER ── */
    .ticker {
      background: var(--dark);
      color: #fff;
      padding: 0.8rem 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .ticker-inner {
      display: inline-flex;
      gap: 3rem;
      animation: ticker 20s linear infinite;
    }

    .ticker-item {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.7rem;
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      opacity: 0.7;
    }

    .ticker-item .t-emoji { font-size: 1.1rem; opacity: 1; }
    .ticker-dot { color: var(--accent); font-size: 1.2rem; }

    @keyframes ticker {
      from { transform: translateX(0); }
      to   { transform: translateX(-50%); }
    }

    /* ── MENU SECTION ── */
    .section {
      padding: 6rem 3rem;
    }

    .section-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-end;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 3rem;
    }

    .section-label {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      color: var(--accent);
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .section-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .see-all {
      color: var(--muted);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem;
      transition: color 0.2s;
      padding-bottom: 0.2rem;
      border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
    }
    .see-all:hover { color: var(--dark); border-color: var(--dark); }

    /* ── FOOD GRID ── */
    .food-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }

    .food-card {
      background: var(--surface);
      border-radius: 20px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
      transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
      cursor: pointer;
      animation: cardIn 0.5s ease both;
    }

    .food-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-6px);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(26,21,8,0.13);
    }

    .food-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.10s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.20s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.30s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(7) { animation-delay: 0.35s; }

    @keyframes cardIn {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    .card-image {
      height: 180px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 5rem;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: transform 0.3s;
    }

    .food-card:hover .card-image { transform: scale(1.04); }

    .card-badge {
      position: absolute;
      top: 1rem; right: 1rem;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
    }

    .card-body {
      padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem 1.4rem;
    }

    .card-category {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    }

    .card-name {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      color: var(--dark);
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .card-desc {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.55;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .card-footer {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .card-price {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      color: var(--dark);
    }

    .card-meta {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.8rem;
    }

    .card-rating {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.3rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--dark);
    }

    .card-time {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .add-btn {
      width: 36px; height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--dark);
      color: #fff;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 1.3rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .add-btn:hover {
      background: var(--accent);
      transform: scale(1.1) rotate(90deg);
    }

    /* color themes per card */
    .card-image.pizza     { background: #fff5ee; }
    .card-image.burger    { background: #fff8ec; }
    .card-image.burrito   { background: #f0faf0; }
    .card-image.taco      { background: #fffbec; }
    .card-image.ice-cream { background: #fef0f8; }
    .card-image.milkshake { background: #f0f4ff; }
    .card-image.fries     { background: #fffbee; }

    /* ── DARK MODE SURFACE OVERRIDES ── */
    html.dark-mode .card-image.pizza     { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c1208 0%, #2a1400 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.burger    { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c1208 0%, #2a1800 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.burrito   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0e160e 0%, #1a2010 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.taco      { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c1208 0%, #241800 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.ice-cream { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #180d1a 0%, #220d28 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.milkshake { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1018 0%, #0e1424 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.fries     { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c1208 0%, #281a00 100%); }

    html.dark-mode .hero-bg-text {
      -webkit-text-stroke: 1.5px rgba(240,62,27,0.12);
    }

    html.dark-mode .hero-headline .stroke {
      -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--accent);
    }

    html.dark-mode .food-card:hover {
      box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(240,62,27,0.12);
    }

    html.dark-mode .btn-ghost {
      color: var(--dark);
      border-color: #3a3628;
    }
    html.dark-mode .btn-ghost:hover {
      border-color: var(--accent);
      background: rgba(240,62,27,0.06);
    }

    html.dark-mode .ticker {
      background: #0a0906;
    }

    /* ── PROMO BANNER ── */
    .promo {
      margin: 0 3rem 6rem;
      background: var(--dark);
      border-radius: 28px;
      padding: 3.5rem 4rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
    }

    .promo::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 80% 50%, rgba(245,166,35,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 30% 50% at 10% 50%, rgba(240,62,27,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .promo-text { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

    .promo-tag {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      color: var(--accent2);
      margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
    }

    .promo-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 4rem);
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    }

    .promo-title span { color: var(--accent2); }

    .promo-desc {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
      max-width: 36ch;
      line-height: 1.6;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .promo-action { position: relative; z-index: 1; text-align: right; }

    .promo-emoji { font-size: 5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; display: block; animation: floatOrb 5s ease-in-out infinite; }

    .btn-promo {
      background: var(--accent2);
      color: var(--dark);
      padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      display: inline-block;
      transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-promo:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(245,166,35,0.35);
    }

    /* ── FOOTER ── */
    footer {
      background: var(--dark);
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 2rem;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
    }

    footer span { color: var(--accent); }

    /* ── CART TOAST ── */
    .toast {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 2rem;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(120%);
      background: var(--dark);
      color: #fff;
      padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
      z-index: 999;
      transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .toast.show { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }

    /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .hero { padding: 6rem 1.5rem 3rem; }
      .hero-bg-text { display: none; }
      .float-orb { display: none; }
      .hero-stats { gap: 1.5rem; }
      .section { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
      .section-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.8rem; }
      .food-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1rem; }
      .promo { margin: 0 1.5rem 4rem; padding: 2rem; flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; text-align: center; }
      .promo-action { text-align: center; }
    }

    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .food-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- NAV -->
  <nav>
    <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
      <div class="logo-mark">G</div>
      <span class="logo-name">quickbites</span>
    </a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      {% if is_logged_in %}
        <a href="#menu">Menu</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('view_cart') }}" style="background: var(--accent); color: #fff; padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem; border-radius: 100px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none;">
          🛒 Cart <span id="cart-count" style="background: #fff; color: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; width: 20px; height: 20px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700;">{{ cart|length }}</span>
        </a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('logout') }}" class="nav-cta">Logout</a>
      {% else %}
        <a href="#menu">Menu</a>
        <a href="#">Offers</a>
        <a href="#">Track Order</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('login') }}" class="nav-cta">Sign In</a>
      {% endif %}
      <button class="dark-toggle" id="dark-toggle" aria-label="Toggle dark mode" title="Toggle dark mode"></button>
    </div>
  </nav>

    <!-- HERO -->
  {% if not is_logged_in %}
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg-text">quickbites</div>

    <!-- floating food -->
    <div class="float-orb">🍕</div>
    <div class="float-orb">🥤</div>
    <div class="float-orb">🍔</div>
    <div class="float-orb">🌮</div>

    <div class="hero-tag">
      <span class="pulse"></span>
      Delivering Now in Bengaluru
    </div>

    <h1 class="hero-headline">
      <span class="red">Fast</span> Food,<br>
      <span class="stroke">Delivered</span><br>
      Faster.
    </h1>

    <p class="hero-sub">
      Your favourite comfort food — at your door in under 30 minutes.
    </p>

    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="#menu" class="btn-primary">
        Order Now
        <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17 8l4 4m0 0l-4 4m4-4H3"/>
        </svg>
      </a>
      <a href="{{ url_for('signup') }}" class="btn-ghost">
        Create Account
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div>
        <div class="stat-num">30K+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Happy Customers</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-num">200+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Restaurants</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-num">28 Min</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Avg Delivery</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- TICKER -->
  <div class="ticker" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="ticker-inner">
      {% set items = [
        ('🍕','PIZZA'),('🍔','BURGER'),('🌯','BURRITO'),('🌮','TACO'),
        ('🍦','ICE CREAM'),('🥤','MILKSHAKE'),('🍟','FRIES'),
        ('🍕','PIZZA'),('🍔','BURGER'),('🌯','BURRITO'),('🌮','TACO'),
        ('🍦','ICE CREAM'),('🥤','MILKSHAKE'),('🍟','FRIES'),
      ] %}
      {% for emoji, label in items %}
        <span class="ticker-item">
          <span class="t-emoji">{{ emoji }}</span>{{ label }}
        </span>
        <span class="ticker-dot">✦</span>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- MENU -->
  <section class="section" id="menu">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div>
        <div class="section-label">What's on the menu</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Pick Your Craving</h2>
      </div>
      {% if is_logged_in %}
      <a href="{{ url_for('view_cart') }}" class="see-all">View cart →</a>
      {% endif %}
    </div>

    <div class="food-grid">

      {% set foods = menu_items %}
      {% for food in foods %}
      <div class="food-card">
        <div class="card-image {{ food.category|lower }}">
          {{ food.emoji }}
          {% if food.badge %}
            <span class="card-badge">{{ food.badge }}</span>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="card-category">{{ food.category }}</div>
          <div class="card-name">{{ food.name }}</div>
          <div class="card-desc">{{ food.description }}</div>
          <div class="card-footer">
            <div>
              <div class="card-price">₹{{ food.price }}</div>
              <div class="card-meta">
                <span class="card-rating">⭐ {{ food.rating }}</span>
                <span class="card-time">🕐 {{ food.time }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            {% if is_logged_in %}
            <button class="add-btn" onclick="addToCart({{ food.id }}, '{{ food.name }}', {{ food.price }})" aria-label="Add {{ food.name }}">+</button>
            {% else %}
            <a href="{{ url_for('login') }}" class="add-btn" style="text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;" aria-label="Sign in to order">+</a>
            {% endif %}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      {% endfor %}

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- PROMO BANNER -->
  {% if not is_logged_in %}
  <div class="promo">
    <div class="promo-text">
      <div class="promo-tag">Limited Time Offer</div>
      <h2 class="promo-title">Get <span>50% OFF</span><br>Your First Order</h2>
      <p class="promo-desc">New to quickbites? Sign up today and your first order is on us — up to ₹150 off. No strings.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="promo-action">
      <span class="promo-emoji">🎉</span>
      <a href="{{ url_for('signup') }}" class="btn-promo">Claim Offer →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <footer>
    <p>Made with <span>♥</span> by quickbites  ·  © 2026  ·  Delivering happiness, one meal at a time.</p>
  </footer>

  <!-- TOAST -->
  <div class="toast" id="toast">
    <span>🛒</span>
    <span id="toast-msg">Added to cart!</span>
  </div>

  <script>
    // ── DARK MODE ──
    const html = document.documentElement;
    const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('dark-toggle');

    // Default: dark mode ON; respect saved preference
    const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('qb-theme');
    if (savedTheme === 'light') {
      html.classList.remove('dark-mode');
    } else {
      html.classList.add('dark-mode');
      if (!savedTheme) localStorage.setItem('qb-theme', 'dark');
    }

    toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const isDark = html.classList.toggle('dark-mode');
      localStorage.setItem('qb-theme', isDark ? 'dark' : 'light');
    });

    // ── CART ──
    let toastTimer;
    
    async function addToCart(itemId, name, price) {
      try {
        const response = await fetch('/add-to-cart', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            id: itemId,
            name: name,
            price: price
          })
        });
        
        if (!response.ok) {
          if (response.status === 401) {
            window.location.href = '/login';
            return;
          }
          throw new Error('Failed to add to cart');
        }
        
        const data = await response.json();
        
        // Update cart count
        const cartCount = document.getElementById('cart-count');
        if (cartCount) {
          cartCount.textContent = data.cart_count;
        }
        
        // Show toast
        const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
        const msg = document.getElementById('toast-msg');
        msg.textContent = name + ' added to cart!';
        clearTimeout(toastTimer);
        toast.classList.add('show');
        toastTimer = setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 2500);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error:', error);
        alert('Failed to add item to cart');
      }
    }
  </script>

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="dark-mode">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>quickbites — Order Food You Love</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      /* Light mode */
      --bg: #faf7f2;
      --surface: #fff;
      --dark: #1a1508;
      --accent: #f03e1b;
      --accent2: #f5a623;
      --muted: #9a9080;
      --border: #ede8df;
      --card-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(26,21,8,0.08);
    }

    html.dark-mode {
      --bg: #0d0c0a;
      --surface: #1a1816;
      --dark: #f0ece4;
      --accent: #f03e1b;
      --accent2: #f5a623;
      --muted: #8a8078;
      --border: #2a2620;
      --card-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--dark);
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      transition: background 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease;
    }

    /* ── NAV ── */
    nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 1.1rem 3rem;
      background: rgba(250,247,242,0.88);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      transition: background 0.3s ease;
    }

    html.dark-mode nav {
      background: rgba(13,12,10,0.88);
    }

    /* ── DARK TOGGLE ── */
    .dark-toggle {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 100px;
      width: 44px;
      height: 24px;
      position: relative;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 0.25s, border-color 0.25s;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .dark-toggle::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 3px;
      left: 3px;
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--muted);
      transition: transform 0.25s, background 0.25s;
    }

    html.dark-mode .dark-toggle::after {
      transform: translateX(20px);
      background: var(--accent2);
    }

    html.dark-mode .dark-toggle {
      background: #252219;
      border-color: #3a3628;
    }

    /* ─── DARK MODE FIXES ─── */
    html.dark-mode .add-btn {
      background: #f03e1b;
      color: #fff;
    }

    html.dark-mode .add-btn:hover {
      background: #d94300;
    }

    html.dark-mode .food-card {
      background: #1a1816;
      border-color: #3a3628;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-category {
      color: #b8a89a;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-name {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-desc {
      color: #8a8078;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-price {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-rating {
      color: #8a8078;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-time {
      color: #8a8078;
    }

    html.dark-mode .card-image.pizza,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.burger,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.burrito,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.taco,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.ice-cream,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.milkshake,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.fries,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.mango-juice,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.donut,
    html.dark-mode .card-image.pasta {
      background: #252219 !important;
    }

    html.dark-mode .section-title-label {
      color: #b8a89a;
    }

    html.dark-mode .section-title {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .view-cart-link {
      color: #f03e1b;
    }

    html.dark-mode .promo {
      background: #1a1816;
      border-color: #3a3628;
    }

    html.dark-mode .promo-title {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .promo-desc {
      color: #b8a89a;
    }

    html.dark-mode .btn-promo {
      background: #f03e1b;
      color: #fff;
    }

    html.dark-mode .btn-promo:hover {
      background: #d94300;
    }

    html.dark-mode .hero-heading {
      color: #f0ece4;
    }

    html.dark-mode .hero-desc {
      color: #b8a89a;
    }

    .nav-logo {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.6rem;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    .logo-mark {
      width: 38px; height: 38px;
      background: var(--accent);
      border-radius: 10px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.4rem;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }

    .logo-name {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      color: var(--dark);
    }

    .nav-links {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 2rem;
    }

    .nav-links a {
      text-decoration: none;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--dark); }

    .nav-cta {
      background: var(--accent) !important;
      color: #fff !important;
      padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      font-weight: 600 !important;
      transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s !important;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: #d94300 !important; transform: translateY(-1px); }

    /* ── HERO ── */
    .hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 8rem 3rem 4rem;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .hero-bg-text {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -52%);
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(12rem, 22vw, 22rem);
      color: transparent;
      -webkit-text-stroke: 1.5px rgba(26,21,8,0.055);
      white-space: nowrap;
      pointer-events: none;
      user-select: none;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }

    .hero-tag {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      background: rgba(240,62,27,0.1);
      color: var(--accent);
      border: 1px solid rgba(240,62,27,0.2);
      border-radius: 100px;
      padding: 0.35rem 1rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
      width: fit-content;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s ease both;
    }

    .hero-tag .pulse {
      width: 7px; height: 7px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--accent);
      animation: pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes pulse {
      0%,100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
      50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.7); }
    }

    .hero-headline {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(4.5rem, 9vw, 9rem);
      line-height: 0.95;
      letter-spacing: 0.01em;
      margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
      position: relative;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s 0.1s ease both;
    }

    .hero-headline .red { color: var(--accent); }
    .hero-headline .stroke {
      color: transparent;
      -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--dark);
    }

    .hero-sub {
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      max-width: 40ch;
      line-height: 1.65;
      margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s 0.2s ease both;
    }

    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 1rem;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s 0.3s ease both;
    }

    .btn-primary {
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #fff;
      padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 1rem;
      transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    }
    .btn-primary:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(240,62,27,0.3);
    }

    .btn-ghost {
      color: var(--dark);
      padding: 0.9rem 1.5rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--dark); background: rgba(26,21,8,0.04); }

    .hero-stats {
      display: flex;
      gap: 2.5rem;
      margin-top: 4rem;
      animation: fadeDown 0.6s 0.4s ease both;
    }

    .stat-num {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 2rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      color: var(--dark);
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .stat-label {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.07em;
      margin-top: 0.2rem;
    }

    /* Floating emoji orbs */
    .float-orb {
      position: absolute;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 2.2rem;
      animation: floatOrb 6s ease-in-out infinite;
      pointer-events: none;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12));
    }
    .float-orb:nth-child(1)  { top: 15%; right: 12%; width: 80px; height: 80px; animation-delay: 0s; }
    .float-orb:nth-child(2)  { top: 40%; right: 25%; width: 64px; height: 64px; animation-delay: 1.2s; }
    .float-orb:nth-child(3)  { top: 65%; right: 8%;  width: 72px; height: 72px; animation-delay: 2.4s; }
    .float-orb:nth-child(4)  { top: 25%; right: 40%; width: 56px; height: 56px; animation-delay: 0.8s; }

    @keyframes floatOrb {
      0%,100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); }
      33%      { transform: translateY(-14px) rotate(5deg); }
      66%      { transform: translateY(8px) rotate(-4deg); }
    }

    @keyframes fadeDown {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-16px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    /* ── TICKER ── */
    .ticker {
      background: var(--dark);
      color: #fff;
      padding: 0.8rem 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .ticker-inner {
      display: inline-flex;
      gap: 3rem;
      animation: ticker 20s linear infinite;
    }

    .ticker-item {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.7rem;
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      opacity: 0.7;
    }

    .ticker-item .t-emoji { font-size: 1.1rem; opacity: 1; }
    .ticker-dot { color: var(--accent); font-size: 1.2rem; }

    @keyframes ticker {
      from { transform: translateX(0); }
      to   { transform: translateX(-50%); }
    }

    /* ── MENU SECTION ── */
    .section {
      padding: 6rem 3rem;
    }

    .section-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-end;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 3rem;
    }

    .section-label {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      color: var(--accent);
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .section-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .see-all {
      color: var(--muted);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem;
      transition: color 0.2s;
      padding-bottom: 0.2rem;
      border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
    }
    .see-all:hover { color: var(--dark); border-color: var(--dark); }

    /* ── FOOD GRID ── */
    .food-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }

    .food-card {
      background: var(--surface);
      border-radius: 20px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
      transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
      cursor: pointer;
      animation: cardIn 0.5s ease both;
    }

    .food-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-6px);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(26,21,8,0.13);
    }

    .food-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.10s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.20s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.30s; }
    .food-card:nth-child(7) { animation-delay: 0.35s; }

    @keyframes cardIn {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    .card-image {
      height: 180px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 5rem;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: transform 0.3s;
    }

    .food-card:hover .card-image { transform: scale(1.04); }

    .card-badge {
      position: absolute;
      top: 1rem; right: 1rem;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
    }

    .card-body {
      padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem 1.4rem;
    }

    .card-category {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    }

    .card-name {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      color: var(--dark);
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .card-desc {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.55;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .card-footer {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .card-price {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      color: var(--dark);
    }

    .card-meta {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.8rem;
    }

    .card-rating {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.3rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--dark);
    }

    .card-time {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .add-btn {
      width: 36px; height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--dark);
      color: #fff;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 1.3rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .add-btn:hover {
      background: var(--accent);
      transform: scale(1.1) rotate(90deg);
    }

    /* color themes per card */
    .card-image.pizza     { background: #fff5ee; }
    .card-image.burger    { background: #fff8ec; }
    .card-image.burrito   { background: #f0faf0; }
    .card-image.taco      { background: #fffbec; }
    .card-image.ice-cream { background: #fef0f8; }
    .card-image.milkshake { background: #f0f4ff; }
    .card-image.fries     { background: #fffbee; }

    /* ── DARK MODE SURFACE OVERRIDES ── */
    html.dark-mode .card-image.pizza     { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c1208 0%, #2a1400 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.burger    { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c1208 0%, #2a1800 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.burrito   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0e160e 0%, #1a2010 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.taco      { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c1208 0%, #241800 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.ice-cream { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #180d1a 0%, #220d28 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.milkshake { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1018 0%, #0e1424 100%); }
    html.dark-mode .card-image.fries     { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c1208 0%, #281a00 100%); }

    html.dark-mode .hero-bg-text {
      -webkit-text-stroke: 1.5px rgba(240,62,27,0.12);
    }

    html.dark-mode .hero-headline .stroke {
      -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--accent);
    }

    html.dark-mode .food-card:hover {
      box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(240,62,27,0.12);
    }

    html.dark-mode .btn-ghost {
      color: var(--dark);
      border-color: #3a3628;
    }
    html.dark-mode .btn-ghost:hover {
      border-color: var(--accent);
      background: rgba(240,62,27,0.06);
    }

    html.dark-mode .ticker {
      background: #0a0906;
    }

    /* ── PROMO BANNER ── */
    .promo {
      margin: 0 3rem 6rem;
      background: var(--dark);
      border-radius: 28px;
      padding: 3.5rem 4rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
    }

    .promo::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 80% 50%, rgba(245,166,35,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 30% 50% at 10% 50%, rgba(240,62,27,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .promo-text { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

    .promo-tag {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      color: var(--accent2);
      margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
    }

    .promo-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 4rem);
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    }

    .promo-title span { color: var(--accent2); }

    .promo-desc {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
      max-width: 36ch;
      line-height: 1.6;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .promo-action { position: relative; z-index: 1; text-align: right; }

    .promo-emoji { font-size: 5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; display: block; animation: floatOrb 5s ease-in-out infinite; }

    .btn-promo {
      background: var(--accent2);
      color: var(--dark);
      padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      display: inline-block;
      transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-promo:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(245,166,35,0.35);
    }

    /* ── FOOTER ── */
    footer {
      background: var(--dark);
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 2rem;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
    }

    footer span { color: var(--accent); }

    /* ── CART TOAST ── */
    .toast {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 2rem;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(120%);
      background: var(--surface);
      color: var(--dark);
      padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem;
      border-radius: 100px;
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
      z-index: 999;
      transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .toast.show { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }

    /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .hero { padding: 6rem 1.5rem 3rem; }
      .hero-bg-text { display: none; }
      .float-orb { display: none; }
      .hero-stats { gap: 1.5rem; }
      .section { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
      .section-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.8rem; }
      .food-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1rem; }
      .promo { margin: 0 1.5rem 4rem; padding: 2rem; flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; text-align: center; }
      .promo-action { text-align: center; }
    }

    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .food-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- NAV -->
  <nav>
    <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
      <div class="logo-mark">G</div>
      <span class="logo-name">quickbites</span>
    </a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      {% if is_logged_in %}
        <a href="#menu">Menu</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('orders') }}">Orders</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('view_cart') }}" style="background: var(--accent); color: #fff; padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem; border-radius: 100px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none;">
          🛒 Cart <span id="cart-count" style="background: #fff; color: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; width: 20px; height: 20px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700;">{{ cart|length }}</span>
        </a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('logout') }}" class="nav-cta">Logout</a>
      {% else %}
        <a href="#menu">Menu</a>
        <a href="#">Offers</a>
        <a href="#">Track Order</a>
        <a href="{{ url_for('login') }}" class="nav-cta">Sign In</a>
      {% endif %}
      <button class="dark-toggle" id="dark-toggle" aria-label="Toggle dark mode" title="Toggle dark mode"></button>
    </div>
  </nav>

    <!-- HERO -->
  {% if not is_logged_in %}
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg-text">quickbites</div>

    <!-- floating food -->
    <div class="float-orb">🍕</div>
    <div class="float-orb">🥤</div>
    <div class="float-orb">🍔</div>
    <div class="float-orb">🌮</div>

    <div class="hero-tag">
      <span class="pulse"></span>
      Delivering Now in Bengaluru
    </div>

    <h1 class="hero-headline">
      <span class="red">Fast</span> Food,<br>
      <span class="stroke">Delivered</span><br>
      Faster.
    </h1>

    <p class="hero-sub">
      Your favourite comfort food — at your door in under 30 minutes.
    </p>

    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="#menu" class="btn-primary">
        Order Now
        <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17 8l4 4m0 0l-4 4m4-4H3"/>
        </svg>
      </a>
      <a href="{{ url_for('signup') }}" class="btn-ghost">
        Create Account
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div>
        <div class="stat-num">30K+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Happy Customers</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-num">200+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Restaurants</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-num">28 Min</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Avg Delivery</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- TICKER -->
  <div class="ticker" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="ticker-inner">
      {% set items = [
        ('🍕','PIZZA'),('🍔','BURGER'),('🌯','BURRITO'),('🌮','TACO'),
        ('🍦','ICE CREAM'),('🥤','MILKSHAKE'),('🍟','FRIES'),
        ('🍕','PIZZA'),('🍔','BURGER'),('🌯','BURRITO'),('🌮','TACO'),
        ('🍦','ICE CREAM'),('🥤','MILKSHAKE'),('🍟','FRIES'),
      ] %}
      {% for emoji, label in items %}
        <span class="ticker-item">
          <span class="t-emoji">{{ emoji }}</span>{{ label }}
        </span>
        <span class="ticker-dot">✦</span>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- MENU -->
  <section class="section" id="menu">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div>
        <div class="section-label">What's on the menu</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Pick Your Craving</h2>
      </div>
      {% if is_logged_in %}
      <a href="{{ url_for('view_cart') }}" class="see-all">View cart →</a>
      {% endif %}
    </div>

    <div class="food-grid">

      {% set foods = menu_items %}
      {% for food in foods %}
      <div class="food-card">
        <div class="card-image {{ food.category|lower }}">
          {{ food.emoji }}
          {% if food.badge %}
            <span class="card-badge">{{ food.badge }}</span>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="card-category">{{ food.category }}</div>
          <div class="card-name">{{ food.name }}</div>
          <div class="card-desc">{{ food.description }}</div>
          <div class="card-footer">
            <div>
              <div class="card-price">₹{{ food.price }}</div>
              <div class="card-meta">
                <span class="card-rating">⭐ {{ food.rating }}</span>
                <span class="card-time">🕐 {{ food.time }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            {% if is_logged_in %}
            <button class="add-btn" onclick="addToCart({{ food.id }}, '{{ food.name }}', {{ food.price }})" aria-label="Add {{ food.name }}">+</button>
            {% else %}
            <a href="{{ url_for('login') }}" class="add-btn" style="text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;" aria-label="Sign in to order">+</a>
            {% endif %}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      {% endfor %}

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- PROMO BANNER -->
  {% if not is_logged_in %}
  <div class="promo">
    <div class="promo-text">
      <div class="promo-tag">Limited Time Offer</div>
      <h2 class="promo-title">Get <span>50% OFF</span><br>Your First Order</h2>
      <p class="promo-desc">New to quickbites? Sign up today and your first order is on us — up to ₹150 off. No strings.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="promo-action">
      <span class="promo-emoji">🎉</span>
      <a href="{{ url_for('signup') }}" class="btn-promo">Claim Offer →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <footer>
    <p>Made with <span>♥</span> by quickbites  ·  © 2026  ·  Delivering happiness, one meal at a time.</p>
  </footer>

  <!-- TOAST -->
  <div class="toast" id="toast">
    <span>🛒</span>
    <span id="toast-msg">Added to cart!</span>
  </div>

  <script>
    // ── DARK MODE ──
    const html = document.documentElement;
    const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('dark-toggle');

    // Default: dark mode ON; respect saved preference
    const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('qb-theme');
    if (savedTheme === 'light') {
      html.classList.remove('dark-mode');
    } else {
      html.classList.add('dark-mode');
      if (!savedTheme) localStorage.setItem('qb-theme', 'dark');
    }

    toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const isDark = html.classList.toggle('dark-mode');
      localStorage.setItem('qb-theme', isDark ? 'dark' : 'light');
    });

    // ── CART ──
    let toastTimer;
    
    async function addToCart(itemId, name, price) {
      try {
        const response = await fetch('/add-to-cart', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            id: itemId,
            name: name,
            price: price
          })
        });
        
        if (!response.ok) {
          if (response.status === 401) {
            window.location.href = '/login';
            return;
          }
          throw new Error('Failed to add to cart');
        }
        
        const data = await response.json();
        
        // Update cart count
        const cartCount = document.getElementById('cart-count');
        if (cartCount) {
          cartCount.textContent = data.cart_count;
        }
        
        // Show toast
        const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
        const msg = document.getElementById('toast-msg');
        msg.textContent = name + ' added to cart!';
        clearTimeout(toastTimer);
        toast.classList.add('show');
        toastTimer = setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 2500);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error:', error);
        alert('Failed to add item to cart');
      }
    }
  </script>

</body>
</html>
